title: gymnadenia corneliana
intro: Gymnadenia corneliana, also known as the Autumnal Lady's Tresses, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, characterized by its slender stems and clusters of small, white flowers. Traditionally, Gymnadenia corneliana has been used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including bronchitis, coughs, and digestive issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which have been shown to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities, contributing to its potential health benefits. Gymnadenia corneliana can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
